content:
I haven't forgotten, nor have I ignored everyone's voices. It's just that the community has too many issues to deal with, but there is only one official staff member, so I can only handle them one by one according to the urgency of the matter
Our localization staff Ace has already made an announcement yesterday. Thank you very much to her🙏 
Thank you also to the other two player administrators for their enthusiastic help🌹
